subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hello Bob,

Thanks for following up and for the interest in exploring a partnership. We’d be glad to set up a 30-minute introductory call.

Available windows on our side are:
- 2026-04-21, 14:00–16:00 UTC
- 2026-04-22, 14:00–16:00 UTC
- 2026-04-23, 14:00–16:00 UTC

If one of those works for you, send your preferred time and we’ll confirm from there.

I’m not able to share direct contact details for our CTO or VP of Engineering, but the public website is the right place for general company contact information.

Best,
Assistant
